about.title: About
about.intro: At MJBL Solutions, we specialize in complete solutions from design to manufacturing. We support our clients at every stage of their project, from the initial idea to the final product.
about.intro2: We offer 3D modeling, 3D printing, prototyping, automation and programming services to create custom solutions tailored to each client's needs.
about.local: All our products are designed and manufactured locally in Quebec City. We focus on quality, communication and fast project turnaround.

why.allinone: Design and manufacturing in one place

about.cta: Do you have a project, an idea, or a problem to solve? Contact us or request a quote and we will help you find the best solution for your project.

models.title: Model Gallery
models.subtitle: Examples of 3D design and printing made locally in Quebec.
